name: Teim Review
description: Template for a Cursor Custom Mode that runs the shared OpenStack review workflow.
instructions: Follow prompts/teim-review-core.md as the authoritative review workflow.
Produce final JSON that matches schemas/review-report-schema.json.
notes: This file is a repository template for Custom Mode setup, not a guaranteed import format.
Use model profile fast for lower-latency runs and deep for higher-quality review passes.
